issues.description: Condition uses TurnCount with max:2, but card text says 'If you have 2 or less Characters' — this is a board state condition (HasCardOnBoard count), not a turn count. Should use a character count condition or custom logic.
Filter missing attribute requirement '<Slash>' — card allows 'Muggy Kingdom type OR <Slash> attribute' but DSL only specifies subType. Must represent both options.
Filter missing exclusion for [Dracule Mihawk] — card specifies 'other than [Dracule Mihawk]' but DSL has no excludeCards or similar restriction.
Action missing 'rested' state — card text specifies cards are played 'rested' but no Rest action or restState flag present in DSL.
Filter missing 'up to 1' quantity constraint — should specify maxQuantity:1 or similar.
